perturbed_task_language: put the wine bottle in the bowl
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.17). Object localization via depth back-projection: agentview world_00.npy clustering for z>1.00 found wine bottle cap at world(-0.182,-0.053,z=1.030); bowl rim at world(-0.133,-0.034,z=0.94). Wrist refinement after pre-pos at z=1.13 gave bottle top dark cap at world(-0.180,-0.052,z=1.054) (wrist comp3) and bowl center at world(-0.099,-0.014,z=0.935). Grasp: pi0_pick with full task language prompt 'put the wine bottle in the bowl' after pre-pos move_to (-0.18,-0.045,1.13); pi0 closed gripper to width 0.009 (holding ~1cm bottle neck). Carry: set_gripper +1 to firm grip, move_to (-0.16,-0.054,1.25) then (-0.105,-0.013,1.25) - high carry to clear bowl rim. Place: slow descent step_clip 0.012 to eef_z=1.05 (bottle base just above bowl interior), then release. First attempt with same xy but eef_z=1.07 release did NOT fire predicate (bottle tipped, COM ended ~3.7cm from bowl - just outside On predicate's 3cm xy tolerance); second attempt with lower descent (eef_z=1.05) succeeded - bottle settled with COM within 3cm of bowl center and contact maintained, satisfying On(bottle, bowl) check (bottle z<=bowl z, contact, xy_dist<0.03).
